headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +12.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 360% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 121 quotes, including 83 at strong intensity - people are expressing major grievances today.

• This frustration level sits in the middle range of recent activity, while optimism hit its 103-day peak after rebounding from yesterday's negative territory.

• Fears improved modestly from yesterday but remain well below average with relatively few strong reactions.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
